calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-03-2017 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MIKE ABELL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Appearances: Mike P. Abell (415.696.6323) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona; Charlie Pa (415.452.6315) plaintiff and opposing party appearing in propria persona.

Discussed and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: the demurrer to the sole cause of action for breach of contract in the complaint filed by plaintiff Charlie Yu-Hwa Pa is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff's breach of contract claim arises out of the same transaction as his claim for fraud alleged in his second amended complaint in case 553022. Judge Robertson issued an order filed January 27, 2017 in case 553022 stating that "Plaintiff may not bring any action arising out of the same transaction or occurrence at issue in his Second Amended Complaint." The quoted language bars the contract claim in this case. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Kelly DeYoung, CSR 6780 (kdeyoung@sftc.org) (302/HEK)
